scripts.seed: cd scripts && uv run --project ../apps/agent python seed_content.py
scripts.dev:agent: cd apps/agent && uv run --env-file ../../.env python agent.py dev
scripts.dev:worker: cd apps/agent && uv run --env-file ../../.env python async_worker.py
scripts.lint:python: cd apps/agent && uv run ruff check . && uv run ruff format --check . && uv run pyright
scripts.lint:python:fix: cd apps/agent && uv run ruff check --fix . && uv run ruff format .
scripts.lint: bun run typecheck && bun run typecheck:web && bunx eslint --max-warnings 0 . && bunx prettier --check 'apps/**/*.{ts,tsx}' 'apps/web/**/*.{html,css}' 'packages/**/*.ts' && bun run lint:python
scripts.lint:fix: bunx eslint --fix . && bunx prettier --write 'apps/**/*.{ts,tsx}' 'apps/web/**/*.{html,css}' 'packages/**/*.ts' && bun run lint:python:fix
scripts.test:server: bun test --cwd apps/server --path-ignore-patterns='**/{db,locations-load.integration}.test.ts' && bun test --cwd apps/server src/db.test.ts && bun test --cwd apps/server src/locations-load.integration.test.ts
scripts.test: bun test --cwd packages/shared && bun run test:server && bun test --cwd apps/mobile && bun test --cwd apps/web
scripts.test:python: cd apps/agent && uv run pytest tests/ -q -m "not acceptance" -n 4
scripts.test:acceptance: cd apps/agent && TESTCONTAINERS_RYUK_DISABLED=true uv run pytest tests/acceptance -m acceptance -q
